user.title: Set up SwitchFlow Controller
user.description: Configure the shared global references used by controllers.

data.smart_mode_entity: Binary sensor/helper that enables controllers (if they are enabled)
data.night_mode_entity: Binary sensor/helper that enables night mode
data.alarm_timer_entity: Alarm delay timer (no alarm notification while active)
data.alarm_notification_script_entity: Alarm notification script (receives message, controller_name, and trigger_entity_id)

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one SwitchFlow Controller configuration entry is supported.

configured_entity_unavailable.title: Configured entity is unavailable
configured_entity_unavailable.description: The configured entity `{entity_id}` for controller `{controller_name}` field `{field_name}` is unavailable. SwitchFlow Controller will use fallback behavior when possible until the entity becomes available again.

init.title: SwitchFlow Controller
init.description: Review existing controllers or choose what you want to do next.

global_settings.title: Edit global settings
global_settings.description: Specify the global entities shared by all controllers.

data.smart_mode_entity: Binary sensor/helper that enables controllers (if they are enabled)
data.night_mode_entity: Binary sensor/helper that enables night mode
data.alarm_timer_entity: Alarm delay timer (no alarm notification while active)
data.alarm_notification_script_entity: Alarm notification script (receives message, controller_name, and trigger_entity_id)

data.activate_on_detection: Turn on when motion/presence is detected
data.illuminance_threshold_entity: Turn on if the illuminance selector value is below
data.turn_off_when_presence_clears: Turn off when the detector resets (may turn off before delay)
data.wait_time: Turn off delay (unless detector clears first)
data.notify_with_alarm: Notify when turn on and alarm is actived
data.turn_off_entity_1: When the main switch/light turns on, turn off switch/light 1
data.turn_off_entity_2: When the main switch/light turns on, turn off switch/light 2

select_controller.title: Select controller
select_controller.description: Choose the controller you want to modify.

controller_actions.title: Controller actions
controller_actions.description: Choose what you want to do with the selected controller.

data.activate_on_detection: Turn on when motion/presence is detected
data.illuminance_threshold_entity: Turn on if the illuminance selector value is below
data.wait_time: Turn off delay (unless detector clears first)
data.turn_off_when_presence_clears: Turn off when the detector resets (may turn off before delay)
data.notify_with_alarm: Notify when turn on and alarm is actived
data.turn_off_entity_1: When the main switch/light turns on, turn off switch/light 1
data.turn_off_entity_2: When the main switch/light turns on, turn off switch/light 2

delete_controller.title: Delete controller
delete_controller.description: Submit to delete the selected controller. This cannot be undone.

abort.no_controllers: There are no controllers to manage.
abort.controller_not_found: The selected controller could not be found.

error.no_controllers: Select a controller for this action first.

error.controlled_entity_already_configured: This controller's main or night switch/light is already used by another controller.
error.main_and_night_entity_must_differ: Main switch/light and night switch/light must be different entities.
error.main_entity_already_configured: A controller with this main switch/light already exists.

data.activate_on_detection: Turn on when motion/presence is detected
data.illuminance_threshold_entity: Turn on if illuminance is below
data.turn_off_when_presence_clears: Turn off when detector clears (may turn off before delay)
data.wait_time: Turn off delay (unless detector clears first)
data.notify_with_alarm: Notify when turn on and alarm is actived
data.turn_off_entity_1: On turn on, turn off the switch/light 1
data.turn_off_entity_2: On turn on, turn off the switch/light 2
